name: human-resources
description: Per-client HR department — brand-agnostic skills and agents across the full HR lifecycle: recruitment, onboarding, compensation & benefits, performance, training, employee & labor relations, compliance, policy/handbook, health-safety-wellness, DEI, records/HRIS, scheduling, workforce strategy, and offboarding. Produces review-ready drafts and reports into the client project — never legal advice, never sends, never mutates live systems without confirmation.
